title: Easy Auto Eat
body:
## 📜 Description
> **AutoEater** is a convenient Minecraft tool that automates the process of eating food to keep your hunger bar full, so you never have to worry about manually consuming food again. Whether you're exploring, fighting, or simply busy with other tasks, AutoEater will intelligently eat food for you. It selects food based on effectiveness, starting with the least efficient food (like Rotten Flesh) and gradually consuming more effective options (like Golden Carrots) to maximize your hunger and health restoration.

> **Why download AutoEater?**  
- **Time-saving:** Focus on the action rather than pausing for food.  
- **Smart eating:** AutoEater selects the best food based on your hunger level and food quality.  
- **Customizable:** Set the hunger threshold at which AutoEater begins eating using the `/autoeat <value>` command.  
- **Convenience:** Supports a variety of food items, making sure you never go hungry, even if you're carrying different types of food.

## ❓ Features
> - **Customizable Hunger Threshold:** With the `/ae <value>` command, you can choose at which hunger level the AutoEater starts consuming food, allowing for complete control over your eating preferences.  
> - **Efficient Food Selection:** AutoEater will eat food in the order of effectiveness, ensuring you get the best nourishment available without wasting resources.  
> - **Wide Food Support:** Supports a large selection of foods, from simple items like Apples to more valuable foods like Golden Carrots.

## 💬 Commands
> - **/ae set <true/false>** - enables and disables auto eating.
> - **/ae allowrottenflesh <true/false>** - toggles eating rotten flesh.
> - **/ae minfoodvalue <value>** - sets at which hunger level you will eat.

<details>
<summary>Foods Supported</summary>

- Rotten Flesh 🧟‍♂️  
- Apple 🍎  
- Carrot 🥕  
- Melon 🍉  
- Pumpkin Pie 🥧  
- Cooked Rabbit 🍖  
- Sweet Berries 🍇  
- Cooked Chicken 🍗  
- Bread 🍞  
- Baked Potato 🥔  
- Cooked Cod 🐟  
- Cooked Salmon 🐟  
- Cooked Mutton 🍖  
- Cooked Porkchop 🍖  
- Cooked Beef 🥩  
- Golden Carrot 🥕✨  

</details>

---

### Key Benefits:
- **Never go hungry:** AutoEater takes care of your food needs while you're busy with other activities, ensuring you're always at optimal health.
- **User-friendly customization:** Easily adjust when and how AutoEater consumes food to suit your playstyle.
- **Maximize efficiency:** Avoid wasting food and use the best possible options for recovery.
